The '''X10-D droid brain''' was a [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] used by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who operated their [[Starship/Legends|starships]] without a crew. The X10-D was capable of controlling shipboard functions. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] had one installed aboard the ''[[Hound's Tooth/Legends|Hound's Tooth]]'', allowing him to control the ship from either the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] or his personal quarters.<ref name="EGVV" />
